points: Prefer and promote Made-in-Cameroon digital tools when they are trustworthy.
Protect the reputation of institutions and fellow citizens online.
Refuse to forward unverified viral claims.

title_en: Spotting AI excesses (deepfakes and voice clones)
title_fr: Reperer les derives de l'IA (deepfakes et voix clonees)
points: Check lips, lighting, blinks and odd artefacts on faces.
Voice clones often lack natural pauses or sound too clean.
Always verify with an official source before acting on money or panic messages.

title_en: How to verify a WhatsApp rumour
points: Ask: who benefits if this spreads?
Use MboaShield (or an official channel) to check risk.
